title: Mads Würtz Schmidt Wins Unbound Gravel 200
content:
The European gravel national champion had a strong day off the front to secure victory in the 20th edition of the race. His Specialized team went 1-2-5 on the day.

Read the full article at Mads Würtz Schmidt Wins Unbound Gravel 200 on Velo.
author: Will Tracy
